No, no, this is really great.
I appreciate it.

And I'm all on board with us testing it out with the batch of 20 and going from there and kind of seeing what produces, the outcomes there, and then keep going or make adjustments and tweak it based off of that.
So that sounds like a plan to me.
Cool.
Amazing.
And if you have any questions about CheckDOT, like as a tool, any other features that are, like, you know, like, in the tool that we didn't go through today, happy to answer as well.
Yeah, for sure.
And I'm, I'm also working on the.
The comparison between Scrunch and CheckedUp for your CMO, so that's also in progress, and happy to share once we align with the team on the details as well.
Yeah, that would be great.
That was going to be my follow-up request, just because I know when I brought it up to Holly, she was like, no, I'm curious.
She's like, that sounds interesting, but what's the difference between Scrunch and how will that serve us, and what are we going to do?
And I was like, let me check this.
For sure.
Yeah, it makes sense.
Thank you.
I mean, like, keep in mind that this tool will evolve.
Marcel also, like, is, you know, like, adding some new layers into the vision, so also, mind that this will evolve into another tool.
Yeah, I figured.
I figured that was the case.

And one thing that I was going to bring up to you before I jump out, she messaged, she Slacked both Paul and I with, like, a LinkedIn post that she got from our VP of product around, basically, it's a claim saying, like, like, to this, is think, I'm...
know you...
it's really person
Because I feel like a lot of the content that we are pushing out is following the structure.
It's just how they're being pragmatic about it.
And yeah, just curious to hear your thoughts.
Yeah, I'll answer in a sync way.
But yeah, happy to check it.

that.

you.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on brand changes and review new AI visibility tools.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Major Rebrand:** The company is rebranding as an "Agentic AI platform for revenue teams" and migrating from `Outreach.io` to `Outreach.ai` and Craft CMS to Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [**Proactive Risk Mitigation:** Hadassah and Paul are drafting a document for execs detailing the SEO risks of the migration and a mitigation plan, establishing a paper trail to manage expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [**New AI Visibility Tool:** GrowthX is replacing Scrunch with "Check That," a new tool offering more reliable data, historical context, and granular, per-LLM analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [**Pilot Program:** A 20-post pilot program will test if creating content for prompts with zero visibility can increase presence, using the batch size for statistical significance.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Brand & Platform Shift

  - [**Problem:** A lack of a consistent brand narrative is diluting the company's signal for search engines and LLMs, making it hard to "own" a market category.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)
  - [**Solution:** A major strategic shift is underway to anchor the brand and platform.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [**New Descriptor:** "Agentic AI platform for revenue teams."](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
      - [**Domain Migration:** `Outreach.io` → `Outreach.ai`.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
      - [**Platform Migration:** Craft CMS → Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [**Internal Communication:** The shift was announced internally via Slack by Becky and Eric; a formal, broader announcement is expected at the SCO meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)

### Proactive Risk Mitigation Strategy

  - [**Rationale:** To avoid reactive panic and manage executive expectations, Hadassah and Paul are drafting a document for leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [**Document Contents:**](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
      - [SEO risk profile of the migration.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
      - [Detailed mitigation plan.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
      - [Execution steps and monitoring strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [**Goal:** Establish a paper trail to prevent future blame and ensure leadership understands the potential trade-offs.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)

### New AI Visibility Tool: Check That

  - [**Tool:** GrowthX is replacing Scrunch with "Check That," a new tool they developed.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [**Key Differentiators vs. Scrunch:**](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
      - [**Historical Data:** Tracks brand performance against competitors over time, not just from the start date.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
      - [**Reliable Data:** Fixes Scrunch's known tracking issues, providing cleaner, more accurate presence metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
      - [**Granular Analysis:** Shows per-LLM data (position, sentiment, citations), enabling targeted optimization for specific platforms like Perplexity.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [**Data Calculation:** Presence is a percentage of total possible responses (prompts × 5 platforms × days), providing a clear, consistent metric.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
  - [**Onboarding:** Jo will invite the Outreach team to the tool this week.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)

### Pilot Program: Increasing AI Visibility

  - [**Hypothesis:** Creating content for prompts where the brand has zero visibility will increase presence for those specific prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [**Pilot Design:**](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
      - [**Batch Size:** 20 blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This batch size is large enough to test for statistical significance, not just anecdotal results.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
      - [**Content:** Focus on topics aligned with prompts where the brand is not currently present.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
      - [**Month 1:** Produce the 20 new posts.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
      - [**Month 2:** Analyze results to see if presence increased for the targeted prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)

### Team & Process Updates

  - [**GrowthX Team Changes:**](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [**Jen:** Moving to a new internal role focused on editorial quality.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [**Usman:** Promoted to Managing Editor for the Outreach account.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [**Content Audit Review:** A deep dive on the content audit with Megan (the audit's creator) is scheduled for two weeks from now.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [**Pre-Migration Technical Audit:** GrowthX (Jo and Talal) will conduct a technical audit next week, covering:](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [Core Web Vitals](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
      - [URL validation](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
      - [Event tracking strategy (with Paul and Andrew)](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Hadassah:**](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
      - [Share the "Agentic AI" descriptor screenshot with GrowthX via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
      - [Send the Zoom link to Anthony (new CMM) for future meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [Request a Scrunch vs. Check That comparison document from Jo for Holly (CMO).](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [Invite the Outreach team to the Check That tool this week.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
      - [Schedule the content audit review with Megan for two weeks out.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
      - [Conduct the pre-migration technical audit with Talal next week.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [Answer the LinkedIn post question asynchronously.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=2085.0)
  - [**Hadassah & Paul:**](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [Finalize and share the SEO risk/mitigation document with execs.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [**GrowthX & Outreach:**](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
      - [Begin the 20-post AI visibility pilot program after the next sync.](https://fathom.video/share/dVzjnFQkKAbej_Snc6s9uhnkWMeD2UQ6?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
